patch.value:
Dogfood 2026-05-17: `pm create --tags '["a","b"]'` saves tags as `["[\"a\"", "\"b\"]"]` with no warning. Critical agent-blocker because MCP server normalizes JSON arrays to CSV but the CLI parser does not, so agents copying examples from tool schemas end up with broken data.

Fix proposal: in src/cli/commands/create.ts parseTags() and equivalent in update.ts, if the raw string trims to a JSON array (starts with [) try JSON.parse and treat the array as the tag list. Apply same to other CSV-style fields (skills, blockedBy) wherever the CLI accepts them.

Acceptance: tests cover CSV input, JSON array input, mixed/spaced input; existing CSV behavior unchanged.
